---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting.

## 🎯 Is This Related to a Problem?

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe the problem you're trying to solve.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...] and I want to be able to [...]"

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

Describe the ideal solution or feature implementation.

Include:
- What should the user experience look like?
- How should it work?
- Any UI mockups or examples?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative solutions or features you've considered:

1. Alternative A
   - Pros: ...
   - Cons: ...

2. Alternative B
   - Pros: ...
   - Cons: ...

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or information about the feature request:

- Links to related issues
- Feedback from other users
- Industry examples
- References to documentation
- Relevant articles or discussions

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I've checked existing issues/discussions about this
- [ ] This aligns with the project scope and goals
- [ ] I can explain why this feature is needed
- [ ] I've provided clear examples or mockups (if applicable)
